entries.name: wise
entries.definition: A Kabbalistic Mysticism Governor embodies the synthesis of spiritual wisdom and practical leadership, guided by kabbalistic mysticism principles.

growth_paths: Via practical application of spiritual principles
ethical_principles: Act in alignment with divine will
Serve the highest good of all beings
Maintain authentic spiritual authority
Honor the wisdom of Kabbalistic Mysticism
power_dynamics: Uses Kabbalistic Mysticism principles for empowerment
